# www.gemoraglobal.co

> Wholesale imitation jewellery manufacturer from Jaipur, India. MOQ 50 units. Export to USA, UK, UAE & 30+ countries. 500+ designs. B2B bulk orders welcome. Est. 2011.

## Home

[Gemora Global — Imitation Jewellery Wholesale Exporter, Jaipur](https://www.gemoraglobal.co): Wholesale imitation jewellery manufacturer from Jaipur, India. MOQ 50 units. Export to USA, UK, UAE & 30+ countries. 500+ designs. B2B bulk orders welcome. Est. 2011.

## About

[About Gemora Global](https://www.gemoraglobal.co/about): Jaipur-based manufacturer since 2011. Factory-direct wholesale supplier with no middlemen. 500+ designs, anti-tarnish coating, full export documentation.

## Wholesale

[Wholesale Enquiry & B2B Pricing](https://www.gemoraglobal.co/wholesale): MOQ 50 units. Tiered bulk pricing. Full export documentation. Shipped to 30+ countries.
